name: Shanghai Port
description: Major East China sea gateway used for export consolidation and container staging prior to ocean transit.

name: Shenzhen Port
description: Southern sea gateway supporting efficient connections into the Red Sea / Gulf routing corridor.

name: Ningbo Port
description: Hangzhou Bay port complex used for bulk movement into multi-leg ocean lanes.

name: Guangzhou Airport
description: Air cargo gateway for high-priority shipments; supports quick handoffs to inland logistics.

name: Beijing Airport
description: Air cargo gateway enabling faster routing via hubs such as Dubai for time-sensitive deliveries.

name: Mombasa Port
description: Primary East African maritime entry point used for import processing and consolidation before inland distribution.

name: Nairobi Airport
description: Kenya’s air gateway for inbound cargo; typically used to accelerate last-mile distribution to ICDs.

name: Nairobi ICD
description: Inland Container Depot for customs handling, cross-dock transfers, and distribution into Kenya’s regional markets.

name: Kisumu Hub
description: Regional inland hub connected to Kenya’s rail corridor and used for downstream consolidation.

name: Djibouti Port
description: Transit sea port enabling multi-leg ocean routing across the Red Sea corridor.

name: Dubai Air Hub
description: Major air transit hub used for rerouting between China’s air gateways and Kenya’s air gateway.
